extDesc.message: Export your YouTube cookies to paste into FinTube's Jellyfin plugin settings, so yt-dlp can download age-restricted or private videos.

popupNotYouTube.message: Not a YouTube tab - exporting saved cookies anyway

popupLead.message: Copy your YouTube cookies and paste them into FinTube's plugin settings in Jellyfin.

popupStep2.message: In Jellyfin: Dashboard → Plugins → FinTube → Settings.

popupStep3.message: Paste into the Cookies box and save.

popupNoCookiesDesc.message: Log in to youtube.com in this browser first, then reopen this popup.

popupPrivacy.message: Cookies are read locally and only copied to your clipboard.
